how i think is best to go with grey pull priority early is:
1) realm study your preferred realm
2) realm study chaos as well
3) if any character really needs a particular ssr card then get one copy
4) realm study preferred realm and/or chaos to get important enlightens
5) get enlightens on very important ssrs
